question: What is Goonj festival at GBPIET?
answer: Goonj is the Annual Cultural Festival of GBPIET, organized since 1996. It features music, dance, drama, competitions and various cultural activities. It is the biggest student event of the year. Check: https://gbpiet.ac.in/student-life/art-and-culture/

question: What is Student Activity Cell at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has an active Student Activity Cell (SAC) that organizes cultural, technical and sports events throughout the year. It manages Goonj festival, Techno-Management fest, and other student activities. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/student-life/student-activity-cell/

question: What sports are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Sports Complex offers Cricket, Football, Basketball, Volleyball, Badminton, Table Tennis, Chess, and other games. The institute participates in VMSBUTU Intercollegiate Tournaments. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/student-life/games-and-sports/

question: What technical events does GBPIET organize?
answer: GBPIET organizes Techno-Management Fest, Internal Hackathons, Design Skill Contests (State Level), IEEE workshops, NPTEL courses, and technical seminars. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/student-life/techno-management/

question: Why choose GBPIET?
answer: Why GBPIET: 1. Government autonomous institute since 1989, 2. UGC autonomous and AICTE approved, 3. Top placements - 92 LPA at Amazon, 4. Experienced faculty with PhD qualifications, 5. Well-equipped labs and library, 6. Beautiful campus in Pauri Garhwal hills, 7. Strong alumni network in top companies, 8. Active IEEE Student Branch and NPTEL chapter, 9. Affordable fees compared to private colleges, 10. Residential campus with hostel for all students. Visit: https://gbpiet.ac.in/why-gbpiet/
